title: 一种数据处理方法、设备及计算机存储介质
excerpt: 使用生产装置不同的传感数据，构建多视图特征，使用一个视图建构的AI模型预测值与真实值之间的残差，再用另一个视图特征构建AI模型去拟合。
author: 杨帆 金宝宝 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明实施例公开了一种数据处理方法，该方法包括：获取生产系统生产流程对应的多个历史数据采集位置和每一历史数据采集位置对应的运行指标类型；基于所述多个历史数据采集位置和所述每一历史数据采集位置对应的运行指标类型构建第一神经网络模型；从历史数据库中获取历史样本数据；其中，所述历史样本数据包括每一所述运行指标类型对应的采集数据和所述生产系统的产品收率；采用所述历史样本数据对所述第一神经网络模型进行模型训练，得到目标神经网络模型。本发明实施例还提供了一种电子设备和计算机可存储介质。

title: 一种数据处理方法、装置及电子设备
excerpt: 使用机器学习模型描述指标之间的关系，将与机器学习模型差别很大的记录识别为噪声剃除后，再将剩下的数据用于生产预测
author: 杨帆 金宝宝 张成松
abstract_zh: 本申请公开了一种数据处理方法、装置及电子设备，方法包括：获得至少一个训练样本，所述训练样本包括至少一个指标的指标数据，所述指标数据包括其所属指标在至少一个时刻下的样本数据，所述训练样本具有预设的收率标签；基于所述样本数据对应的时刻属性和指标属性，对所述训练样本中的样本数据进行去噪；基于经过去噪的训练样本与其具有的收率标签，对初始模型进行训练，得到关系模型，所述关系模型表征所述指标与收率之间的关系。可见，本申请中利用样本数据中的时刻属性和指标属性对样本数据进行去噪，使得用于训练关系模型的样本数据更加准确，由此使得利用这些样本数据所训练出的关系模型更加准确，从而达到提高关系模型准确率的目的。

title: 焦炭质量预测方法、装置及计算机设备
excerpt: 根据焦碳生产过程工艺数据，结合机理知识加工、筛选特征，使用机器学习算法预测质量。
author: 杨帆 戴超男 金继民 张成松
abstract_zh: 提供一种焦炭质量预测方法、装置及计算机设备，方法包括：获取待测煤样的焦炭质量数据；提取焦炭质量数据中的焦炭质量特征；基于第一筛选规则及第二筛选规则，对提取出的焦炭质量特征进行特征筛选，得到目标焦炭质量特征，其中，第一筛选规则基于行业评价标准确定，第二筛选规则基于数据挖掘算法生成；将目标焦炭质量特征输入对应的焦炭质量预测模型，得到待测煤样的焦炭质量指标，焦炭质量预测模型是对样本煤样的目标焦炭质量特征进行训练得到的。在本申请中，通过以上方式可以实现针对性地预测，提高预测结果的准确性。

title: 信息处理方法、装置、系统及存储介质
excerpt: 基于用户画像、设备数据和行为特征数据，以最小化加权等待时间为优化目标，自动分配呼叫中心客服等待队列。
author: 杨帆 杨沛 余健伟 张成松
abstract_zh: 提供了一种信息处理方法，该方法包括：获取等待接待的M个用户的用户特征；获取未接待用户的N个客服的客服特征；根据M个用户的用户特征及N个客服的客服特征，确定N个客服接待M个用户中每个用户的预测时长，得到预测时长集；以及根据预测时长集，确定与N个客服中的至少一个客服匹配的至少一个被接待用户，以使至少一个客服接待匹配的被接待用户的预测时长之和最小，其中，每个客服与匹配的被接待用户一一对应，M与N均为自然数。本公开还提供了一种信息处理装置、一种信息处理系统以及一种计算机可读存储介质。

title: 训练收率预测模型的方法和装置
excerpt: 使用多任务神经网络，根据炼油装置的可控操作变量，预测各种观测变量和产品收率。
author: 杨帆 金宝宝 金继民 余健伟 张成松
abstract_zh: 提供了一种训练收率预测模型的方法，包括获得训练数据，所述训练数据包括多个第一指标的数据以及收率的数据，所述多个第一指标包括可控指标和不可控指标，基于所述多个第一指标的数据，从所述不可控指标中确定与任意所述可控指标的相关性大于第一阈值的不可控指标作为第一类不可控指标，以及将其他不可控指标确定为第二类不可控指标，将所述可控指标的数据和所述第二类不可控指标的数据作为输入，将所述收率的数据作为输出，训练所述收率预测模型。本公开还提供了一种训练收率预测模型的装置

title: 一种处理方法及电子设备
excerpt: 根据用户驾驶习惯和路况特征，精确预测车辆当前能源条件下能行驶的距离。
author: 王耀晖 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 一种处理方法及电子设备，首先确定电动汽车需要经过的路段中每一个路段的路段类型以及多个电动汽车在该路段类型上行驶时的车辆行驶信息，进而确定特征数据，根据每一个路段的特征数据及能量回归模型或行驶时长回归模型确定预估能耗或预估行驶时长，并进一步确定电动汽车经过其所要经过的全部路段时所需要消耗的全部预估能量。本方案中通过能量回归模型及行驶时长回归模型确定每一路段的预估能耗及预估行驶时长，从而确定全部所需消耗的预估能耗，实现了对电动汽车行驶过程中能耗的预估，从而提醒用户该电动汽车行驶过程中所需要消耗的可能能量，避免了在行驶过程中能量用尽的情况。
abstract_en: The present invention discloses a processing method and an electronic device. According to the processing method and the electronic device of the invention, the road segment type of each of road sections where electric vehicles need to pass, and the vehicle driving information of the plurality of electric vehicles which is obtained when the electric vehicles drive on the road segment types, are determined, feature data are determined; estimated energy consumption or an estimated driving duration is determined according to the feature data, energy consumption regression model and driving duration regression model of each road segment, and therefore, all required estimated energy consumption can be determined; and therefore, the energy consumption of the electric vehicles during a driving process can be realized, users can be informed of possible energy to be consumed during the driving of the electric vehicles, and a condition that the energy of the electric vehicles is exhausted duringthe driving process can be avoided.

title: 一种优化焦炭生产的方法、装置和设备
excerpt: 根据焦碳生产过程工艺数据，使用机器学习算法预测质量，并搜索最优质量的工艺指标集。
author: 杨帆 金继民 余健伟 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明公开了一种优化焦炭生产的方法、装置和设备。该方法包括：根据历史数据构建焦炭质量预测模型，并对焦炭质量预测模型进行训练，得到第一焦炭质量数据，其中，历史数据包括焦炭生产技术参数数据、配合煤数据和焦炭质量数据；根据第一焦炭质量数据和业务需要确定第一焦炭质量数据中的待优化指标数据；采用优化算法对待优化指标数据进行优化，并根据优化结果得到待优化指标数据的建议值；根据建议值调整焦炭生产技术参数数据或配合煤数据，以提高焦炭质量。本发明充分考虑了实际生产中焦炭生产技术参数和配合煤对焦炭质量的影响，因此，优化了焦炭生产。
abstract_en: The invention discloses a method, a device and equipment for optimizing coke production. The method comprises the following steps: constructing a coke quality prediction model according to historicaldata, and training the coke quality prediction model to obtain first coke quality data, the historical data comprising coke production technical parameter data, blended coal data and coke quality data; determining to-be-optimized index data in the first coke quality data according to the first coke quality data and business needs; optimizing the to-be-optimized index data by adopting an optimization algorithm, and obtaining a suggested value of the to-be-optimized index data according to an optimization result; and adjusting the coke production technical parameter data or the blended coal dataaccording to the suggested value so as to improve the coke quality. According to the method, the influence of coke production technical parameters and blended coal on the coke quality in actual production is fully considered, so that the coke production is optimized.

title: 一种信息处理方法及信息处理装置
excerpt: 根据驾驶行为和电池当前状态，预测电池健康度，并提供延长电池使用的优化方案。
author: 王耀晖 罗云生 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明提供的一种信息处理方法及信息处理装置，所述方法应用于电动汽车，包括：获得驾驶行为的实际参数信息和通过预设算法得到的预期参数信息；基于所述实际参数信息得到所述电动汽车的电池的实际健康值；基于所述预期参数信息得到所述电池的预期健康值；若所述预期健康值大于所述实际健康值；则以预设方式将所述实际参数信息调整为所述预期参数信息，并输出相应的提示信息，能够通过所述提示信息指导用户的驾驶行为，以达到延长电池使用寿命，减少资源浪费，提高电池使用效率的效果。
abstract_en: The invention provides an information processing method and an information processing device, and the method is applied to an electric vehicle, and comprises the steps: obtaining the actual parameterinformation of a driving behavior and the expected parameter information obtained through a preset algorithm; Obtaining an actual health value of a battery of the electric vehicle based on the actualparameter information; Obtaining an expected health value of the battery based on the expected parameter information; If the expected health value is greater than the actual health value, adjusting the actual parameter information to be the expected parameter information in a preset mode, and outputting corresponding prompt information, so the driving behavior of the user can be guided through theprompt information, and therefore the effects of prolonging the service life of the battery, reducing resource waste and improving the use efficiency of the battery are achieved.

title: 一种数据处理方法和设备
excerpt: 用于实时数据采集的服务器集群构建方案。
author: 余健伟 王耀晖 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明实施例公开了一种数据处理方法，所述方法包括：获取待上传数据，并将所述待上传数据转换成多个数据块的采集任务；获取服务器集群中的每个服务器的负载，并基于所述每个服务器的负载给每个服务器分配所述采集任务；其中，所述服务器集群中包括至少两个用于采集所述待上传数据并上传至数据处理平台的服务器。本发明的实施例同时还公开了一种数据处理设备。

title: 实体匹配方法、装置及电子设备
excerpt: 使用机器学习标注算法结构化解析实体名称，并基于字符相似、行业知识特征进行实体对齐。
author: 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明公开了一种实体匹配方法、装置及电子设备，该方法包括：获取待匹配的实体名称；从包含多个标准实体名称的标准名称库中，搜索出与实体名称的匹配度较高的多个候选实体名称；确定实体名称与候选实体名称分别在至少一个预设维度上的相似性；综合实体名称与候选实体名称在至少一个预设维度上的相似性，从多个候选实体名称中，确定出与实体名称在至少一个预设维度上的综合相似性最高的候选实体名称；将综合相似性最高的候选实体名称确定为实体名称对应的标准实体名称。本申请的方案可以增大实体名称匹配所适用的情况，提高实体名称匹配的精准度，并减少人力资源消耗。
abstract_en: The invention discloses an entity matching method and apparatus, and an electronic device. The method comprises the steps of obtaining an entity name to be matched; Searching a plurality of candidateentity names with higher matching degree with the entity names from a standard name library containing a plurality of standard entity names; Determining similarities between the entity names and the candidate entity names in at least one preset dimension; Synthesizing the similarity of the entity names and the candidate entity names in at least one preset dimension, and determining the candidate entity name with the highest comprehensive similarity of the entity name in at least one preset dimension from the plurality of candidate entity names; And determining the candidate entity name with the highest comprehensive similarity as a standard entity name corresponding to the entity name. According to the scheme, the applicable situation of entity name matching can be increased, the accuracyof entity name matching is improved, and manpower resource consumption is reduced.
field: 自然语言处理与知识图谱

title: 实体匹配方法、装置及电子设备
excerpt: 使用词向量和深度学习进行实体对齐。
author: 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明公开了一种实体匹配方法、装置及电子设备，该方法包括：获取待匹配的实体名称；根据该实体名称所包含的字符串，确定用于表征该实体名称所表达的语义的第一编码向量；分别计算该实体名称的第一编码向量与标准名称库中各个标准实体名称的第二编码向量之间的距离；从该标准名称库的多个标准实体名称中，选取出对应的该距离较小的至少一个候选实体名称；根据该实体名称的第一编码向量和该候选实体名称的第二编码向量，确定该候选实体名称与该实体名称在多个预设维度上的特征匹配度；将该特征匹配度符合预设要求的候选实体名称确定为该实体名称对应的标准实体名称。本申请可以提高实体匹配的精准度，并减少人力资源消耗。
abstract_en: The invention discloses an entity matching method and device, and an electronic device. The method comprises the steps of obtaining an entity name to be matched; determining a first coding vector usedfor representing semantics expressed by the entity name according to the character string contained in the entity name; respectively calculating the distance between the first coding vector of the entity name and the second coding vector of each standard entity name in the standard name library; selecting at least one corresponding candidate entity name with a smaller distance from a plurality ofstandard entity names in the standard name library; determining feature matching degrees of the candidate entity names and the entity names in a plurality of preset dimensions according to the firstcoding vectors of the entity names and the second coding vectors of the candidate entity names; and determining the candidate entity names of which the feature matching degrees meet preset requirements as standard entity names corresponding to the entity names. According to the invention, the accuracy of entity matching can be improved, and the manpower resource consumption is reduced.
field: 自然语言处理与知识图谱

title: 预警方法及装置
excerpt: 根据生产设备的运行参数，使用机器学习算法预测发生各类异常的概率。
author: 杨帆 金继民 王耀晖 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明公开了一种预警方法及装置，获取设备的预定运行参数在最近的预设历史时长内的若干测量值，并提取该若干测量值的多个维度的特征；将所提取的多个维度的特征输入与上述预定运行参数对应的预先训练好的预警模型，得到表征设备的上述预定运行参数在未来是否发生异常预警结果，实现了对设备的预定运行参数在未来是否发生异常的预测。
abstract_en: The embodiment of the invention discloses an early warning method and device. The method comprises the following steps that: obtaining a plurality of measurement values of the preset operation parameters of equipment in latest preset historical duration, and extracting the characteristics of a plurality of dimensions of the plurality of measurement values; and inputting the extracted characteristics of the plurality of dimensions into a pre-trained early warning model corresponding to the above preset operation parameters to obtain an early warning result which represents whether the above preset operation parameters of equipment are exceptional or not. Therefore, whether the preset operation parameters of equipment are exceptional or not in the future is predicted.

title: 数据处理方法及其装置
excerpt: 根据设备当前状态和运行参数，使用机器学习算法计算其健康程度，并结合历史运行情况预测未来的健康程度。
author: 王耀晖 余健伟 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明提供了一种数据处理方法，包括：获取目标对象在第一预定时间段内的第一特征信息，其中，特征包括目标对象的环境特征和目标对象的动态特征；训练第一特征信息以获得预测模型，其中，预测模型用于预测目标对象的健康程度；获取目标对象在第二预定时间段内的第二特征信息；以及将第二特征信息输入预测模型以得到目标对象在第二预定时间段内的健康程度。本公开还提供了一种数据处理装置。
abstract_en: The invention provides a data processing method. The method comprises the following steps of acquiring first characteristic information of a target object in a first predetermined time period, whereincharacteristics include an environment characteristic of the target object and a dynamic characteristic of the target object; training the first characteristic information to obtain a prediction model, wherein the prediction model is used for predicting the health degree of the target object; obtaining second characteristic information of the target object in a second predetermined time period; and inputting the second characteristic information into the prediction model to obtain the health degree of the target object in the second predetermined time period. The invention further provides adata processing device.

title: 信息处理方法和具有电驱动功能的车辆
excerpt: 根据当前车辆位置和能源状态，使用机器学习算法预测到达目的地时的能源状态，消除用户里程焦虑。
author: 王耀晖 葛雨辰 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明提供了一种信息处理方法，应用于具有电驱动功能的车辆，所述方法包括：获取车辆位置信息、目的地信息以及可行驶里程的关联参数；根据所述车辆位置信息和所述可行驶里程的关联参数确定车辆是否可到达目的地或最近的充电地点；以及在可到达时提示乘员可到达信息。本公开还提供了一种具有电驱动功能的车辆。
abstract_en: The invention provides an information processing method applied to a vehicle with an electric driving function. The method comprises the steps of acquiring vehicle position information, destination information and associated parameters of driving mileage, determining whether the vehicle can reach a destination or the nearest charging place or not according to the vehicle position information and the associated parameters of the driving mileage, and prompting passengers of reaching information when the vehicle can arrive. The invention further provides the vehicle with the electric driving function.

title: 一种数据处理方法及服务器
excerpt: 根据句法关系，将自然语言描述的问题进行结构化解析，并转换为图查询语言。
author: 金继民 金宝宝 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明公开的一种数据处理方法及服务器，在获得问题语句后，基于问题语句的句子成分确定问题语句所属的问句类别，并在问题语句属于预定问句类别的情况下，对问题语句进行依存句法分析，得到问题语句的各组成元素间的依存信息，进而基于问题语句的各组成元素间的依存信息以及所述问题语句的句子成分，对问题语句进行结构化解析，得到问题语句的结构化信息。通过利用问题语句的各组成元素间的依存信息以及问题语句的句子成分，对问题语句进行结构化解析，可达到较好的解析效果，进而可基于解析结果准确地识别用户问句意图。
abstract_en: A data processing method and a server are disclosed. After the problem statement is obtained, based on the sentence components of the problem statement, the question category to which the problem statement belongs is determined, and if the question statement falls into the predetermined question category, Dependency syntactic analysis is carried out on the problem statement to obtain dependency information among the constituent elements of the problem statement, and then structural analysis is carried out on the problem statement based on the dependency information among the constituent elements of the problem statement and sentence components of the problem statement to obtain structural information of the problem statement. By using the dependency information among the constituent elements of the question statement and the sentence components of the question statement, the problem statement can be structurally parsed, and the user's question intention can be accurately identified based on the parsing results.
field: 自然语言处理与知识图谱

title: 一种数据处理方法、服务器及电子设备
excerpt: 使用无限长度的循环神经网络预测流程制造设备的目标指标变化。
author: 杨帆 金宝宝 金继民 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明提供的一种数据处理方法、服务器及电子设备，可利用循环神经网络训练一预测模型，该预测模型用于对预定设备的目标指标进行预测。在训练预测模型时，除了以训练样本为模型输入，还引入了待预测指标所对应的所述预定设备的设备状态信息，并具体以第一训练样本的上一样本在训练过程中输出的第一设备状态信息作为第一训练样本在进行训练时的状态输入信息，这就使得设备状态信息能够按各样本的训练次序在各样本的训练过程中进行传递，相对应地能够使得所得的预测模型达到对设备状态信息的长时记忆效果，后续在利用该预测模型进行预测时，能够结合预测样本的数据及记忆的设备状态信息对目标指标进行预测，从而可使得预测结果具备较高的准确率。
abstract_en: The present invention provides a data processing method, a server and an electronic device, which can train a prediction model by using a circulating neural network, and the prediction model is used for predicting a target index of a predetermined device. In a process of training the prediction model, In addition to taking training samples as model input, equipment state information of the predetermined equipment corresponding to an index to be predicted is also introduced, and the first equipment state information outputted from the upper sample of the first training sample in the training process is taken as the state input information of the first training sample at the time of training, this enables the equipment state information to be transmitted in the training process of each sample according to the training order of each sample, Correspondingly, the obtained prediction model can achieve the long-term memory effect of the equipment state information, and when the prediction model is used for subsequent prediction, the target index can be predicted by combining the data of the prediction sample and the memorized equipment state information, so that the prediction result canhave a higher accuracy rate.

title: 一种数据处理方法、服务器及电子设备
excerpt: 根据问题及答案，筛选候选模板集，并通过机器学习算法对候选集排序，使用最合适的模板封装答案。
author: 杨帆 金继民 金宝宝 张成松
abstract_zh: 本申请提供的一种数据处理方法、服务器及电子设备，在获得问题数据以及问题数据所对应的答案信息基础上，基于问题数据所对应的问题模型确定所述答案信息所对应的答案模型，并进而基于所述答案模型生成问题数据对应的至少一个候选答案语句，由于针对问题数据，生成了符合其答案模型的至少一个候选答案语句，从而为答案语句的确定提供了语言表述形式(语句形式)方面的选择空间，能够支持智能问答系统从中选择出更加贴近人类自然语言的答案语句，进而可有效提升智能问答系统在语言表述形式方面的答案质量。
abstract_en: the invention provides a data processing method,a server and an electronic device. on the basis of obtaining the question data and the answer information corresponding to the question data, determining an answer model corresponding to the answer information based on the question model corresponding to the question data, and further generating at least one candidate answer statement correspondingto the question data based on the answer model, in accordance with that problem data, generating at least one candidate answer statement that conforms to its answer model, Thus, the choice space of language expression forms (sentence forms) is provided for the determination of answer sentences, the intelligent question answering system can be supported to select the answer sentences which are closer to human natural language, and the answer quality of the intelligent question answering system in language expression forms can be effectively improved.
field: 自然语言处理与知识图谱

title: 一种数据处理方法及装置
excerpt: 使用爬虫获取与目标网页相同路径的其它网页，通过后缀树寻找公共xpath路径，获取domTree的公共节点，进而得到网页模板。
author: 杨帆 戴超男
abstract_zh: 本发明公开了一种数据处理方法及装置，方法包括：解析至少一个页面，以分别获取每一个所述页面对应的节点路径信息列表；基于所述节点路径信息列表，对所述至少一个页面中的页面之间进行结构比对，得到相似页面；对所述相似页面的节点路径信息列表设置标签；基于具有相同标签的节点路径信息列表，生成与该标签相匹配的页面抽取模板。
abstract_en: The invention discloses a data processing method and device. The method comprises the following steps: analyzing at least one page to obtain a node path information list corresponding to each page; carrying out structural comparison among pages in the at least one page based on the node path information list to obtain similar pages; setting a label on the node path information list of the similarpage; based on the node path information list with the same label, generating a page extraction template matching the label.
field: 自然语言处理与知识图谱

title: 构造产率预测模型的方法、系统及产率预测方法和系统
excerpt: 在生产设备上，通过传递熵、相关性等方法，寻找影响收率的工艺参数，并通过随机森林预测产量。
author: 杨帆 金继民 金宝宝 张成松
abstract_zh: 本公开提供了一种构造产率预测模型的方法，包括获得训练数据，所述训练数据包括可能影响产率的多个因素的数据以及产率的数据，获得多个因素集以及与所述因素集对应的权重，基于因素与产率的相互关系，将所述多个因素映射到所述多个因素集中，以及基于处理后的训练数据和所述权重构造用于产率预测的随机森林模型，其中，所述权重与生成节点时，作为选择对应的因素集的因素的概率相关。本公开还提供了一种产率预测方法、一种构造产率预测模型的系统以及产率预测系统。
abstract_en: The present invention provides a method for constructing a yield prediction model. The method for constructing the yield prediction model includes the following steps that: training data are obtained,wherein the training data include the data of a plurality of factors that may affect yields, and the data of the yields; a plurality of factor sets and weights corresponding to the factor sets are obtained; the plurality of factors are mapped to the plurality of factor sets based on correlations between the factors and the yields; and a random forest model for yield prediction is constructed based on the processed training data and the weights, wherein the weights are related to probabilities of selecting the factors of the corresponding factor sets when nodes are generated. The present invention also provides a yield prediction method, a system for constructing a yield prediction model, and a yield prediction system.

title: 数据同步方法及其系统以及服务器集群
excerpt: 根据元数据变化，获取源数据与目标数据的差异，进行增量更新。
author: 杜军芝 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 本公开提供了一种数据同步方法，该方法包括：获取来自数据源的用于描述内容数据对象的第一数据；获取存储在第一存储空间中用于描述内容数据对象的第二数据，其中，第二数据和已存储元数据对应，第二数据的数据量小于已存储元数据的数据量；比较第一数据和第二数据的差异，得到差异比较结果；以及基于差异比较结果对已存储元数据进行更新。本公开还提供了一种数据同步系统以及一种服务器集群。
abstract_en: The invention provides a data synchronization method. The method comprises the steps of acquiring first data for describing a content data object from a data source; acquiring second data which is stored in a first storage space and used for describing the content data object, wherein the second data corresponds to stored metadata, and the data amount of the second data is smaller than that of thestored metadata; comparing the difference between the first data and the second data to obtain a difference comparison result; updating the stored metadata based on the difference comparison result.The invention also provides a data synchronization system and a server cluster.

title: 化学反应路径获取方法、装置、电子设备及存储介质
excerpt: 将一系列化学反应抽象成图模型，寻找到达指定结点后成本最低、能耗最小、副产品价值最高等路径。
author: 杨帆 匡启帆 金宝宝 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明实施例公开了化学反应路径获取方法、装置、电子设备及存储介质，预先构建化学反应关系有向图，利用化学反应关系有向图建立了多个化学反应的关联关系，即以图的形式将孤立的多个化学反应关联起来；目标反应物对象包括的至少一个反应物对应化学反应关系有向图中相应位置的节点，目标产物对象包括的至少一个产物对应化学反应关系有向图中相应位置的节点。本发明实施例目标化学反应路径的查询转换成化学反应关系有向图中至少两个节点之间路径的查询，即利用该化学反应关系有向图，可以得到目标化学反应路径；即使目标反应物对象与目标产物对象不属于同一化学反应方程，通过化学反应关系有向图，也可以得到目标化学反应路径。
abstract_en: The embodiments of the invention disclose a chemical reaction path acquisition method and device, an electronic device, and a storage medium. A chemical reaction relationship direct graph is constructed in advance, and a plurality of chemical reaction correlation relationships are established by the chemical reaction relationship directed graph, namely, isolated chemical reactions are associated in the form of a graph. A target reactant object comprises at least one reactant corresponding to a node at a corresponding position in the directed graph of the chemical reaction relationship, and a target product object comprises at least one product corresponding to a node at a corresponding position in the directed graph of the chemical reaction relationship. A target chemical reaction path query in that embodiment of the present invention is convert into a path query between at least two nodes in a chemical reaction relation digraph, namely, the target chemical reaction path can be obtainby using the chemical reaction relation digraph; and the target chemical reaction path is converted into a path query between at least two nodes in the chemical reaction relation digraph. Even if thetarget reactant object and the target product object do not belong to the same chemical reaction equation, the target chemical reaction path can be obtained through the directed graph of chemical reaction relationship.

title: 物体表面缺陷检测方法和装置
excerpt: 通过双目相机，获取物体表面的深度信息，结合图像平面特征，通过卷积神经网络判断表面伤痕的类型和程度。
author: 张成松 杨帆 王耀晖
abstract_zh: 本公开提供了一种物体表面缺陷检测方法，包括：获取物体表面的图像的指定信息，所述指定信息包括：图像深度信息；基于所述图像深度信息，分析所述物体表面是否存在缺陷。本公开还提供了一种物体表面缺陷检测装置、一种实现上述物体表面缺陷检测方法的计算机设备。
abstract_en: A method for detecting a surface defect of an object is provided. That method includes: obtaining designation information of an image of an object surface, wherein the designation information includesimage depth information; and analyzing whether the object surface has a defect or not on the basis of the image depth information. The present disclosure also provides a device for detecting a surface detect of an object, and a computer device for realizing the method detecting the surface detect of the object.

title: 用于数据分析流程调度的方法、装置和服务器集群
excerpt: 根据一系统任务的依赖关系和先后顺序，把任务流解析为有向无环图（DAG），基于DAG调度任务。
author: 余健伟 张成松 杨帆 胡成伟
abstract_zh: 本公开提供了一种用于数据分析流程调度的方法，包括：根据单个业务数据分析流程之间的依赖关系，获取多业务的分析有向流程；根据预设的调度规则，或者预设的调度规则和预设的依赖规则对所述分析有向流程进行调度。本公开还提供了一种用于数据分析流程调度的装置以及一种服务器集群。
abstract_en: The invention provides a method used for data analysis process scheduling. The method comprises the following steps that: according to a dependency relationship in a single business data analysis process, obtaining the analysis directed process of multiple businesses; and according to a preset scheduling rule or a preset scheduling rule and a preset dependency rule, scheduling the analysis directed process. The invention also provides a device used for data analysis process scheduling, and a server cluster.

title: 一种数据处理方法及装置
excerpt: 根据数据生成、修改、访问的信息，构建特征，使用机器学习模型预测数据的生命周期。
author: 杨帆 金宝宝 张成松
abstract_zh: 本申请提供的数据处理方法及装置，在获得待处理数据后，提取待处理数据的特征数据，该特征数据包括待处理数据在时间维度或数据访问频次维度特征中的至少之一；在此基础上，利用预先训练的数据处理模型对特征数据进行处理以确定待处理数据的生命周期状态。本申请方案由于利用了预先训练的数据处理模型基于待处理数据在时间维度或数据访问频次维度的特征中的至少之一，来确定待处理数据的生命周期状态，从而，在确定待处理数据的生命周期状态时，具体是利用了大数据在时间维度或数据访问频次维度的特征中的至少之一与大数据生命周期状态的对应关系的规律，这与现有技术相比，既降低了人力成本，又可使得所确定的数据生命周期状态具有较高的准确度。
abstract_en: The invention provides a data processing method and device. According to the method, after to-be-processed data is obtained, feature data of the to-be-processed data is extracted, wherein the featuredata comprises at least one of features of the to-be-processed data in a time dimension or a data access frequency dimension; and based on the feature data, a pre-trained data processing model is utilized to process the feature data so as to determine the life cycle state of the to-be-processed data. According to the scheme, the pre-trained data processing model is utilized to determine the life cycle state of the to-be-processed data based on at least one of the features of the to-be-processed data in the time dimension or the data access frequency dimension, therefore, when the life cycle state of the to-be-processed data is determined, the law of the corresponding relation between at least one of the features of big data in the time dimension or the data access frequency dimension and the life cycle state of the big data is utilized specifically. Compared with the prior art, labor cost is lowered, and the determined data life cycle state can have high accuracy.

title: 信息处理方法电子设备
excerpt: 基于SPO约束自编码神经网络文本生成的方法和装置
author: 杨帆 匡启帆 金宝宝 张成松
abstract_zh: 本发明实施例公开了一种信息处理方法及电子设备。所述方法包括：获取第一文本；基于所述第一文本，确定第一关键词语；将与所述第一关键词语对应的第一关键词语向量输入到转化模型中，以基于所述第一关键词语向量生成第二文本，其中，所述第二文本包括所述第一关键词语及所述第一关键词语之外的词语。
abstract_en: Embodiments of the invention disclose an information processing method and an electronic device. The method comprises the steps of obtaining a first text; based on the first text, determining a firstkeyword; and inputting a first keyword vector corresponding to the first keyword to a conversion model, thereby generating a second text based on the first keyword vector, wherein the second text comprises the first keyword and words except the first keyword.
field: 自然语言处理与知识图谱

title: 文本中噪音词的识别方法、装置、服务器组及存储介质
excerpt: 将待识别文本中的每个文字依次转换为字向量，通过机器学习获得噪声词的位置标记，和噪声类型。
author: 金宝宝 杨帆 张成松
abstract_zh: 本申请提供了一种文本中噪音词的识别方法、装置、服务器组及存储介质，方法包括：获取待识别文本，将待识别文本中的每个文字依次转换为字向量，获得与待识别文本对应的字向量集合，将与待识别文本对应的字向量集合输入预先建立的噪音词识别模型，得到噪音词识别模型输出的待识别文本中噪音词的识别结果，其中，噪音词识别模型以标注了噪音词的训练文本对应的字向量集合为训练样本进行训练得到。本申请提供的文本中噪音词的识别方法可通过预先建立的噪音词识别模型对待识别文本进行识别，由于噪音词识别模型基于标注了噪音词的训练文本训练得到，因此，通过该噪音词识别模型可从待识别文本中识别噪音词。
abstract_en: The invention provides an identification method, device, server group and storage medium for noise words in a text. The method comprises the steps that a to-be-identified text is acquired, each word in the to-be-identified text is converted into a word vector in turn, a word vector set corresponding to the to-be-identified text is acquired, the word vector set corresponding to the to-be-identifiedtext is input in a preconstructed noise word identification model, an identification result of the to-be-identified text output by the noise word identification model is obtained, wherein a word vector set corresponding to a training text with annotating the noise words is taken as a training sample for training to obtain the noise word identification model. According to the identification methodfor the noise words in the text, the to-be-identified text can be identified through a preconstructed noise word identification model, because the noise word identification model is obtained based onthe training text with annotating the noise words, the noise words can be identified in the to-be-identified text through the noise word identification model.
field: 自然语言处理与知识图谱

title: 一种数据处理方法、装置和电子设备
excerpt: 基于用户序列多视图的半监督机器学习算法,通过对少量标注有属性标志的历史行为数据进行训练扩展，自动且准确得到了大量用户标识对应的属性标志。
author: 杨帆 王耀晖 金宝宝
abstract_zh: 本申请提供了一种数据处理方法、装置及电子设备，在获取到多个用户标识关联的历史行为数据，可以筛选当前标注有属性标志的至少一个第一用户标识，并将该至少一个用户标识关联的历史行为数据构成第一数据集，其他历史行为数据构成第二数据集，之后，本申请利用该第一数据集，按照协同训练算法，获得第二数据集中多个第二用户标识对应的属性标志。由此可见，本申请通过对少量标注有属性标志的历史行为数据进行训练扩展，自动且准确得到了大量用户标识对应的属性标志，无需人工一一标注各用户标识的属性标志，降低了人力成本，且大大提高了工作效率。
abstract_en: The application provides a data processing method and apparatus, and an electronic device. When historical behavior data associated with a plurality of user identifiers are obtained, at least one first user identifier currently marked with an attribute flag can be screened, a first data set is constituted with the historical behavior data associated with the at least one user identifier, and a second data set is constituted with the other historical behavior data. Afterwards, in the application, the first data set is used to obtain, according to a collaborative training algorithm, a plurality of attribute flags corresponding to second user identifiers in the second data set. Thus, according to the application, the attribute flags corresponding to a large number of user identifiers can be obtained automatically and accurately by training and expanding a small amount of historical behavior data marked with the attribute flags, without manually marking the attribute flag of each user identifier, the labor cost is reduced, and the work efficiency is greatly improved.
